case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,243.00 U.S. CURRENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,243.00 (ONE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED FORTY-THREE DOLLARS) U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT BO M. YU.-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
